note.text:
Dear Dr. Jones,
This referral is being sent to you for patient Mrs. Alex Kirby. She is being treated for chronic conditions for which we are conducting additional preventative measures to ensure co-morbidity conditions are not caused as a result of her condition or recent gap in care. We have already ordered labs and are addressing other social impacts that may affect her condition. Please refer to her patient record to reference other actions that have been taken for her ongoing care.
Sincerely,
Dr. Smith
